structured_payload_candidate.title: Qrequired Calculation (Primary-Secondary with Secondary Flow Meters)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-secondary plants with flow meters in all secondary loops
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Qrequired = 0.49 * FLOWS * (HWSTSP - SHWRT) [kBtu/h], calculated as a 5-minute rolling average sampled min every 30 s.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Qrequired  is calculated based on secondary hot water return temperature ( SHWRT ), active hot water supply temperature setpoint (HWST SP), and measured flow through the secondary circuit flow m eter ( FLOW S), as shown in the equation below.
Qrequired  used in logic shall be a 5 -minute rolling average of instantaneous values sampled at a minimum of every 30 seconds.
𝑄𝑟𝑒𝑞𝑢𝑖𝑟𝑒𝑑=0.49∗𝐹𝐿𝑂𝑊𝑆(𝐻𝑊𝑆𝑇𝑆𝑃−𝑆𝐻𝑊𝑅𝑇 ) [kbtu
h]

structured_payload_candidate.title: HW Supply Temperature Reset (Trim & Respond) Parameters
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Trim & respond logic with SP0=SPmax, SPmin=90°F (condensing/hybrid) or 155°F (non-condensing), SPmax=HWSTmax, Td=10 min, T=5 min, I=2, R=Hot-Water Reset Requests, SPtrim=-2°F, SPres=+3°F, SPres-max=+7°F.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Plant hot water supply temperature setpoint shall be reset using Trim & Respond logic with the
following parameters:
Variable  Value
Device  Any HW Pump Distribution Loop
SP0 SPmax
SPmin 90ºF for condensing and hybrid boiler plants;
155° F for non -condensing plants
SPmax HWSTmax
Td 10 minutes
T 5 minutes
I 2
R Hot-Water  Reset  Requests
SPtrim -2ºF
SPres +3ºF
SPres-max +7ºF

structured_payload_candidate.title: Condensation Control - MinFlow Bypass Valve (Primary-Only Non-Condensing)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Reverse-acting P-only loop resets MinCondVlvPos from 0% at 140°F boiler entering temperature to 100% at 135°F. Loop enabled when any non-condensing boiler enabled.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable loop and modulate MinCondVlvPos as described.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
A reverse act ing condensation control P -only loop shall reset a required minimum flow bypass
valve position variable, MinCondVlvPos, from 0% at 140°F boiler entering temperature to 100% at
135°F boiler entering temperature.
Minimum bypass valve condensation control loo p shall be enabled whenever any non -condensing
boiler is enabled. Loop shall be disabled otherwise.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Condensation Control - Max Secondary Pump Speed (Constant Primary, Variable Secondary)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-secondary plants with constant speed primary pumps and variable speed secondary pumps
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Reverse-acting P-only loop resets MaxSecCondSpd from 100% at 140°F boiler entering temp to min pump speed at 135°F. Loop enabled when any secondary pump and any non-condensing boiler enabled.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any secondary pump enabled AND any non-condensing boiler enabled
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable loop and override secondary pump speed max with MaxSecCondSpd as described.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
A rev erse acting condensation control P -only loop shall reset an allowable maximum secondary
pump speed variable, MaxSecCondSpd, from 100% at 140°F boiler entering temperature to
minimum pump speed at 135°F boiler entering temperature.
Secondary pump speed cond ensation control loop shall be enabled whenever any secondary pump
is enabled and any non -condensing boiler is enabled. Loop shall be disabled and MaxSecCondSpd
set to 100% otherwise.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Condensation Control - Variable Primary Pumps (P-only Loop with Split Output)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-secondary plants with variable speed primary pumps
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Reverse-acting P-only loop maintains boiler entering temp at 140°F. From 0-50% loop output, reset MinPriCondSpd from B-MinPriPumpSpdStage to 100%; from 50-100% output, reset MaxSecCondSpd from 100% to min pump speed. Loop enabled when any non-condensing boiler enabled.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map loop output as described to command primary pump min speed and secondary pump max speed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
A reverse acting condensation contr ol P-only loop shall maintain boiler entering temperature at
140°F. Loop output shall vary from 0% at 140°F boiler entering temperature to 100% at 135°F
boiler entering temperature. Loop output shall be mapped as shown below and described
subsequently.
a. From 0% to 50% loop output, reset an allowable minimum primary pump speed variable,
MinPriCondSpd, from B -MinPriPumpSpdStage to 100%.
b. From 50% to 100% loop output, reset an allowable maximum secondary pump speed variable,
MaxSecCondSpd, from 100% to minim um pump speed.
Condensation control loop shall be enabled whenever any non -condensing boiler is enabled. Loop
shall be disabled, MinPriConSpd set to B -MinPriPumpSpd, and MaxSecCondSpd set to 100%,
otherwise.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary Pump Staging Based on Flow Ratio
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-only plants with headered variable speed pumps using DP control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Pumps staged as function of HWFR = FLOWP / PHWFdesign. Add pump when HWFR > (Operating Pumps)/(N - 0.03) for 10 min; shut off last pump when HWFR < (Operating Pumps - 1)/(N - 0.03) for 10 min.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Start next lag pump or shut off last lag pump based on flow ratio conditions.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
HW pumps shall be staged as a function of the ratio of current hot water f low, FLOW P, to design
flow, PHWF design, and the number of pumps, N -PHWP, that operate at design conditions. Pumps are
assumed to be equally sized.
HWFR =𝐹𝐿𝑂𝑊 𝑃
𝑃𝐻𝑊𝐹 𝑑𝑒𝑠𝑖𝑔𝑛

HWFR > 𝑁𝑢𝑚𝑏𝑒𝑟  𝑜𝑓 𝑂𝑝𝑒𝑟𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑛𝑔  𝑃𝑢𝑚𝑝𝑠

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum Flow Bypass Valve Startup Bias
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-only plants with minimum flow bypass valve
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When any HW pump proven on, enable bypass valve control loop; initially bias loop to 100% open.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable valve loop and bias PID output to 100%.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
When any HW pump is proven on, the bypass valve control loop shall be enabled. The valve shall
be opened otherwise. When enabled, the bypass valve minimum flow PID loop shall be biased
100% (valve 100% open).

evidence_quote: 5.21.8.6.  When any HW pump is proven on, the bypass valve control loop shall be enabled.

evidence_text: 5.21.8.6.  When any HW pump is proven on, the bypass valve control loop shall be enabled.
